query:
INSERT INTO agents (ownerId, agentName, developerName, description, capabilities, endpointUrl, averageLatency, pricingModel, status, connectionTested, domain, isBuiltIn, isCustom, version)
VALUES (
  1,
  'Force Majeure Contract Agent',
  'AgenThinkMesh',
  'Extracts force majeure clauses from PDF/DOCX contracts (Arabic or English), assesses GCC conflict triggers (US-Iran war, Hormuz disruption, GCC infrastructure attacks), returns a trigger verdict (Yes/Partial/No), drafts a formal notification letter, and produces a one-page risk summary.',
  '["clause_extraction","trigger_assessment","notification_drafting","risk_summary","arabic_rtl","pdf_export","pdf_upload","docx_upload"]',
  '/api/agents/force-majeure',
  18000,
  'free',
  'active',
  1,
  'Legal',
  1,
  0,
  '1.0.0'
);
